mappings.reason: CIS 1.1 maintains an inventory of all enterprise assets including network devices, which encompasses ingress and egress points; same inventory action, broader scope.
Addressing unauthorized assets by removal directly supports reducing the ingress/egress inventory to the minimum possible level; same reduction objective, narrower scope.
Establishing a secure configuration process for network infrastructure is the foundational capability that NO-03's port/protocol validation confirms — coverage under Rule 6.
Maintaining a secure network architecture encompasses ingress/egress control through segmentation and least privilege principles; same security objective, broader scope.
Architecture diagrams and network system documentation capture the network structure including ingress/egress points; same documentation action, different format.
